parameters.query: SELECT id, platform, channel, lang, account_id, post_style, status, priority FROM adoff_autopilot.channels ORDER BY priority ASC, lang ASC

INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.posts_queue (workflow, platform, account_id, target_url, lang, body, quality_score, status, scheduled_at) SELECT 'ml-channel', $1, $2::int, $3, $4, $5, 7, CASE WHEN $6 THEN 'draft' ELSE 'queued' END, NOW() + (random()*interval '6 hours') WHERE $7 = false AND $8 = false RETURNING id, status, lang, platform, target_url
